criteria.comment: Memories capture deployment patterns, review dynamics, and technical decisions — not just event logs. Could improve by extracting implicit preferences.
No duplicate memories from the same source. Different perspectives on the same entity (e.g., Bob as reviewer) are distinct insights.
source_chat_ids populated but some IDs don't perfectly match fixture chat IDs. about_integrations correctly set.
action_pattern used for deployment flow, fact used for reviewer role and HNSW config. Correct semantic match.
Confidence scores are reasonable (0.85-0.95 range). Could be lower for single-source inferences.
All 3 high/mid signal chats produce memories. No noise-only memories generated.

overall_comment: Solid memory extraction from Slack fixture. Memories are distinct, well-typed, and capture durable insights. Main improvement area: confidence calibration could be more conservative for single-source facts. Baseline passes threshold (3.85 / 5.0 > 3.0).

_meta.note: Hand-scored baseline. Replace with live judge run when API keys are available.
